description: Правила использования внутренних и внешних ссылок, а также логика автоматического исправления.

internal_links.cross_category_exception: ../ allowed for cross-category links (e.g. from concepts/ to entities/) as long as target exists under wiki/

external_links.prohibited: [text](raw/**) — never link to raw/. [text](../**) — relative paths prohibited.
external_links.unavailability_check: log broken URLs (404/timeouts) → inform user, do NOT auto-remove

scoring.shared_sources: 2 base + diminishing factor (+1 for each additional shared source)

crosslink_discovery.system_file_exclusion: log.md, issues.md, timeline.md, overview.md, snapshot.md, index.md, hot.md, AGENTS.md, context.md, PLAN.md
